ratings.comment: Great personable guy. Really enjoyed the class, learned a lot, and appreciated how Morris made it as immersive as possible. Readings are pretty short and exams are straight-forward with no strings attached. 270 was a fantastic choice for ethnic studies.

Such an easy class to understand. Switch to online went amazing. Gives clear instructions and keeps understandable schedule for assignments. Also has wonderful knowledgeable TA's. Would absolutely recommend.
TAKE THIS CLASS IF YOU CAN! Easy A but also interesting subject matter so makes the papers easier. And professor Young is so sweet and extremely lenient if you miss a class or draft deadline.
He is easily one of the most knowledgeable, understanding, and easygoing professors you would ever come across. Amazing human.
